mnemonics.title: CONSTRUCT
mnemonics.content: C - Class name, O - Overloading allowed, N - No return type, S - Same name as class, T - this() for chaining, R - Reduce code duplication, U - Understand default constructor, C - Called automatically, T - this() must be first

mnemonics.title: CHAIN
mnemonics.content: C - Call another constructor, H - Helps reduce code, A - Always use this(), I - Initialize objects, N - No return type

mnemonics.title: COD
mnemonics.content: C - Class name, O - Overloading, D - Default constructor provided
